Ruling: There being no appearance by any other party or counsel, the Court adopted the tentative ruling on Defendant City And County Of San Francisco's Motion For Issue Sanctions And Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $1,500 Against Plaintiff'S Counsel Russell Robinson as follows: The Motion is granted in part and denied in part. Sanctions are awarded against plaintiff in the amount of $750.
